notes:
In a new game, the initial custscene plays normally, but after the gameplay begins crashs are iminent when pausing or going to the next room).

Loading the game through the continue option crashes immediatly, as soon as the scene begins to render it's first frames.
When loading by the Retry option, the game will only crash at the same conditions of a new game: pausing or going to the next room.

Currently only intro cutscreen, main menu, settings menu, game loading menu, and new game options works fine with my HW.

In previous versions of Proton the game didin't crash with simple actions, but the NPCs or the playing character wold be invisible. After december Steam's update the game become unplayable, crashing before almost anything can be tested.
title: Valdis Story: Abyssal City

notes: Runs perfectly right out of the box. Haven't noticed any issues, graphical or otherwise.
title: Valdis Story: Abyssal City
